Strong starts
at 5:30 a.m.

Coach-led group classes built for women — strength, cardio, toning and flexibility in a space where every member is seen, corrected and cheered on. All levels welcome, first-timers especially.

Meet your coach

Train with Runa

Runa built this studio for women who want real results without the intimidation of a big-box gym. She watches every member closely, corrects form rep by rep, and knows exactly how far to push you — enough to grow, never enough to break. Members come for the workout and stay for the energy.

♀

A women-only space

A bright, private studio where you can focus on yourself — comfortable from your very first class.

✓

Coached, not just supervised

Runa checks posture and form for every member, every session — beginners get patient, step-by-step guidance.

★

Fun that keeps you coming back

"Fun workouts" is the single most repeated phrase in our reviews. You'll leave sweaty, smiling and proud.

What we train

One hour. Every muscle.

Every session is a full-hour, coach-led group class. Workouts rotate through the week so your whole body gets worked — and no two sessions feel the same.

01

Full-body strength

Dumbbell and bodyweight training that builds real, noticeable strength — legs, arms, back and core, all in balance.

02

Cardio & conditioning

Heart-pumping circuits that build stamina and burn energy — scaled to your level, so you finish strong, not defeated.

03

Toning & sculpt

Targeted work for arms, glutes and core. Members report visible toning within their first weeks of consistent classes.

04

Balance & flexibility

Mobility and stretch work that eases stiffness and everyday aches — many members say neck and back pain faded after joining.

05

Core & posture

Focused core sessions with hands-on form correction, so every plank and crunch actually counts.

06

Beginner onboarding

Never trained before? You're in good company — many members walked in as complete beginners and were guided step by step.

Reserve your class

Studio hours

Early birds & after-work warriors

Classes run Monday to Friday, from the 5:30 a.m. sunrise session through to 7:30 p.m. Spots are limited and classes fill fast — regulars will tell you a spot with Runa is worth the wait.

Book now

The RUNA crew

Real women. Real energy.

No stock photos here — this is the actual community you'll be sweating, laughing and growing stronger with, straight from the studio floor.

Join the crew

Ready when you are

Your first class is three taps away

Spots are limited to keep classes personal, so book ahead. Come as you are — bring water, a towel, and shoes you can move in. Runa handles the rest.

1 Open the online booking page
2 Pick a class time that fits your day
3 Show up — we'll be cheering for you
Register for classes
